programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: Darrel and Patrice of Maxam Hotels embark on an epic journey to build a tiny home resort.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: Darrel and Patrice begin construction, laying the foundation for the resort.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: The tension begins to mount as the deadline looms larger.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: It’s all hands-on deck at the resort and the team is working around the clock.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: With power finally in place, the Maxams begin to ready the resort for opening.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.

programme.desc: Jillian experiences a kaleidoscope of color exploring the Mosaic Tile House and the Rainbow House.

programme.sub-title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.desc: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone
programme.desc: Jillian dives into community living, exploring how we create spaces that bring us closer together.

programme.title: Holistic Home
programme.desc: Hollie’s bland master bedroom lacks any sense of tranquility.

programme.title: Holistic Home
programme.desc: Jordan and Jeff crave an oasis that completely reimagines what a home gym can be.

programme.title: Holistic Home
programme.desc: Anne is an entrepreneur whose home office headquarters is having an identity crisis.

programme.title: Holistic Home
programme.desc: Nate and Emily have spent months remodeling, but the kitchen has been last on their list.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.
